approver: User in Codex task / human owner
defect: A plaintext synthetic login credential was committed in an out-of-scope local role-bootstrap script.

verification.source_path_state: credential-bearing file recurred during verification and was removed again

human_follow_up: Stop or identify the external writer, and rotate or invalidate the exposed synthetic credential in every environment where it may have been used. The value remains present in existing Git history until separately authorized remediation occurs. HCP-04 recovery approval is also required before restoring the previously approved safe comment-only initialization source.
